text:
C++ Online Test - TestDome

TestDome offers a C++ programming assessment designed to evaluate real-world coding skills. The platform features 'work-sample tasks' including algorithm implementation, memory management optimization, and object-oriented programming principles.

For Job Seekers: Candidates can practice and earn certificates by scoring in the top 25% on public questions.

For Companies: Organizations can screen candidates starting at '$7 per candidate,' with AI proctoring to detect human or AI assistance.

Sample Questions: The test includes problems across various difficulty levels:
- Easy: 'Mega Store' (discount calculations), 'Game Platform' (character speed physics)
- Hard: 'Boat Movements' (graph traversal), 'Pipeline' (higher-order functions)

Topics covered include data structures, memory management, inheritance, recursion, and algorithmic thinking.

The test evaluates 'knowledge of programming in the C++ language and commonly used parts of the C++ Standard Library' through live coding challenges.

TestDome is reportedly used by companies including Adobe, McAfee, and Turkish Airlines.
